modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live chat session and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to activate Office due to device error.

full_description_text:  
The user was trying to activate Office on their Windows device but ran into a problem. They received an error message saying the device is disabled, and now Office is only showing as a viewer. They mentioned needing to contact their system administrator for help with this issue.
short_description: Unable to activate Office due to device error.
description: The user was trying to activate Office on their Windows device but ran into a problem. They received an error message saying the device is disabled, and now Office is only showing as a viewer. They mentioned needing to contact their system administrator for help with this issue.
